title: Size of Equal Groups
essential_question: How can you model division to find how many in each group?
strategies: Deal out counters one at a time into each group until all are used.
Think: total ÷ number of groups = size of each group.

pretest.question: 15 counters in 3 equal groups. How many in each?

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.2 'Size of Equal Groups' pp.225-228
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing (Partitive)
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Finding the Size of Each Group
learn.content: When you know the total and the number of groups, divide to find how many in each group. 28 ÷ 7 = 4 means 28 items in 7 groups = 4 in each.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.2 'Size of Equal Groups' pp.225-228
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing (Partitive)
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Using Counters
learn.content: Put out 7 circles. Deal 28 counters one at a time into each circle. Keep going until all 28 are placed. Count how many in each circle: 4. So 28 ÷ 7 = 4.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.2 'Size of Equal Groups' pp.225-228
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing (Partitive)
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Check with Multiplication
learn.content: If 28 ÷ 7 = 4, check: 7 × 4 = 28. ✓ Always verify: groups × size = total.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.2 'Size of Equal Groups' pp.225-228
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing (Partitive)
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Bar Model for Group Size
learn.content: Draw a bar for the total (28). Mark 7 equal parts — one for each group. The unknown size is 28 ÷ 7 = 4 in each part. Bar models help you see: total ÷ groups = each.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.2 'Size of Equal Groups' pp.225-228
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing (Partitive)
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: The Division Equation
learn.content: When you know the total and number of groups, write: Total ÷ Groups = Each. Example: 28 total ÷ 7 groups = 4 each. The answer (quotient) tells you the size of each group. Check: 7 × 4 = 28. ✓

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.2 'Size of Equal Groups' pp.225-228
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing (Partitive)
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 분배(나누어 주기) 루틴 — 한 명당 몇 개?
learn.content: 전체 ÷ 모둠 수 = 모둠당 크기. 예: 24개를 6명에게 똑같이 나누면? 24 ÷ 6 = 4 → 한 명당 4개. 단계 1) 전체와 모둠 수를 찾기 (전체 24, 모둠 6). 단계 2) 전체 ÷ 모둠 수 식 세우기 (24 ÷ 6). 단계 3) 곱셈으로 풀기 (몇 × 6 = 24? → 4). 단계 4) 답의 단위 = '한 명당' 또는 '한 모둠당'.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.2 'Size of Equal Groups' pp.225-228
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing (Partitive)
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 곱셈으로 검산 — 답이 맞는지 확인
learn.content: 분배 나눗셈을 풀고 나면 곱셈으로 검산하세요. 예: 30 ÷ 6 = 5 → 검산: 5 × 6 = 30 ✓. 예: 42 ÷ 7 = 6 → 검산: 6 × 7 = 42 ✓. 검산 결과가 전체와 다르면 답이 틀린 것. 흔한 실수 (M06): 곱셈 사실로 검산하지 않고 그냥 답 적기 — 쉬운 한 단계로 오답을 90% 잡아낼 수 있음.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.2 'Size of Equal Groups' pp.225-228
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing (Partitive)
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 크기 vs 개수 — 답의 단위 구분
learn.content: 분배 모델(이번 레슨)은 모둠당 '크기'를 구함 (한 명당 몇 개). 측정 모델(다음 레슨)은 '모둠의 개수'를 구함 (몇 묶음). 예: '15개를 5명에게 똑같이' → 한 명당 3개 (크기). 예: '15개를 5개씩 묶음' → 3묶음 (개수). 🔍 검증: 답을 적기 전 항상 단위 확인 — '한 명당 ___개' 또는 '___개의 묶음'. 흔한 실수 (M02): 답의 숫자만 맞고 단위가 틀린 경우.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.2 'Size of Equal Groups' pp.225-228
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing (Partitive)
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

practice_r2.question: Find the difference: 600 − 234.
practice_r2.explanation: 600−234: 0−4 borrow → 10−4=6; tens 9−3=6 (after lending across zeros); hundreds 5−2=3. Result: 366.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.2 'Size of Equal Groups' pp.225-228

hints: The cupcakes start as 36 total. Then 2 are eaten.
36 − 2 = 34. (The 6-per-plate detail describes the groups, but the key is subtracting 2 eaten.)

feedback.incorrect: Start with 36 cupcakes and subtract 2 that were eaten: 36 − 2 = 34.

hints: Total (48) ÷ size of each group (6) = number of groups (tables).
Think: 6 × ? = 48. Since 6 × 8 = 48, there are 8 full tables.

feedback.incorrect: Use the related fact: 6 × 8 = 48, so 48 ÷ 6 = 8 tables.

hints: Step 2: she gives away 4 boxes × 6 muffins each = 4 × 6 = 24 muffins.

feedback.correct: Great! 60÷6=10 boxes, and 4 boxes × 6 muffins = 24 muffins given away.
feedback.incorrect: Step 1: 6×10=60, so 10 boxes. Step 2: 4 boxes × 6 muffins = 24 muffins.

practice_r3.question: Mrs. Lee bakes 60 muffins and puts 6 in each box. She gives 4 boxes to neighbors. How many muffins does she give away?
practice_r3.feedback_correct: Great! 60÷6=10 boxes, and 4 boxes × 6 muffins = 24 muffins given away.
